title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Verify that the static import fix for mkdirSync in src/store/graph.ts is correctly implemented and that all gate commands (build, test, lint) pass. Update documentation to reflect the resolved state.
key_changes: Verify static import of mkdirSync from 'fs' in src/store/graph.ts
Confirm save() function is synchronous with no await expressions
Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation succeeds
Run npm test to verify all tests pass including CART-B01 regression guard
Run npm run lint to verify code passes ESLint checks
Update CLAUDE.md known-issues section to reflect resolved state

review_plan.objective: Assess whether the plan for CART-S01-T01 correctly scopes verification of the mkdirSync static import fix and gate execution.
key_changes: mkdirSync confirmed in static top-level import on line 2 of src/store/graph.ts
save() is synchronous with no await/async/Promise — verified independently
Only one import from 'fs' — mkdirSync added to existing import, not duplicated
All three gates pass: build (tsc), test (31/31), lint (eslint)
CLAUDE.md has no CART-B01/mkdirSync entry — acceptance criterion #6 already met
CART-B01 regression guard tests mkdirSync call ordering — correct property
No security concerns — static import reduces attack surface vs dynamic import
